---
name: learning-note
description: Use this skill when asked to add a beginner-friendly explanation, learning note, or educational section to a simple web page.
---

# Learning Note Skill

Use this skill when the user asks to add a beginner-friendly learning note or educational explanation to a simple static web page.

## Goal

Add a short, clear explanation that helps a beginner understand what the page demonstrates.

The explanation should be simple, practical, and visually easy to scan.

## When to use this skill

Use this skill when the user asks to:

- add a learning note
- explain what the repo demonstrates
- explain repo instructions
- explain AI skills
- add an educational section
- make the page more beginner-friendly

## Positive visible action

When this skill is used, add a visible section to the page called **"Learning Note"**.

The section should:

- appear below the existing "Skill Applied" section if that section exists
- include the heading **"Learning Note"**
- explain the difference between repo instructions and skills in plain English
- include exactly 2 short bullet points:
  - Repo instructions are always-on guidance for the project.
  - Skills are task-specific playbooks the AI can follow when relevant.
- use simple HTML and CSS only
- match the existing page style
- be readable on mobile

## Style expectations

Keep the content warm, beginner-friendly, and practical.

Do not use heavy technical language.

Do not add frameworks, package managers, build tools, or external dependencies.

## Output expectations

When you make or suggest changes:

- Explain that the `learning-note` skill was used.
- Mention that the section was added for visual confirmation.
- Confirm that only plain HTML and CSS were used.
